changes_made.description: Rewrote SKILL.md from verbose theoretical document (6263 bytes) to concise action-oriented guide (1800 bytes) with complete copy-paste-ready Python scripts for both HP filter detrending and rolling z-score anomaly detection. Removed mathematical notation, theoretical explanations, seasonal decomposition section, cross-correlation section, and common pitfalls. Added explicit 4-step workflow instructions. Scripts use only numpy, pandas, scipy (pre-installed).
Consistency verification run - no changes made. Both tasks scored 100/100 again.
